name: clarity-agent-cli
description: CLI and broker interface for Human-in-the-Loop workflows across Clarity agents

scripts.build:cli: mkdir -p dist && clarityc pack clarity/runtime-chat/main.clarity -f main -o dist/runtime-chat.cjs && clarityc pack clarity/runtime-agents/main.clarity -f main -o dist/runtime-agents.cjs && clarityc pack clarity/connect/main.clarity -f main -o dist/connect.cjs && clarityc pack clarity/answer/main.clarity -f main -o dist/answer.cjs && chmod +x dist/runtime-chat.cjs dist/runtime-agents.cjs dist/connect.cjs dist/answer.cjs bin/clarity-agent.js
